text: RTS games combine resource management, base building, and real-time tactical combat. Players gather resources → build structures → produce units → control battles — all simultaneously. Classic examples: StarCraft, Age of Empires, Command & Conquer. Key design: fog of war, tech trees, unit counters, macro vs. micro management.
APM (Actions Per Minute): measure of player speed — pros average 200-400 APM in StarCraft.
